title: BhutOPurbo
overview: On a stormy evening, two strangers arrive at Bibhutibhushan's ancestral home. As rain pours outside, the men exchange mysterious stories of a greedy woman's spirit bound to her jewels, a mystic caught between power and peace, and a conman whose perfect crime takes a dark turn.

title: Ali Ali
overview: In a quiet Rajasthani village, young Ali clings to his cricket bat as his friends chase it. What starts as playful mischief reveals a film crew struggling to finish their shoot, blurring childhood and the fragile magic of cinema.

title: The Singing Priest
overview: In 2015, Roman Catholic priest Rob Galea joined the Australian version of The X Factor but, due to his holy duties, had to withdraw. But this didn't stop him from becoming a widely beloved contemporary Christian singer-songwriter.

title: Biker
overview: An adrenaline-fueled motocross racing drama that follows competitors as they navigate dangerous competitions and face intense challenges on their bikes.

title: Carmeni Selvam
overview: A content man's life turns chaotic when money fever strikes. His newfound greed leads to a series of amusing situations that unfold in this humorous tale.

title: Honeybee Ridge
overview: When they discover that humans have developed a more profitable way to produce honey, a bankrupt beehive declares war on the human race.

title: Outcome
overview: Reef Hawk, Hollywood's poster child since age six, is not okay. When he learns about an extortion plot tied to a mysterious video, Reef preemptively sets out on a redemption tour to make amends, confront his demons, and avoid getting canceled.

title: Love Insurance Kompany
overview: In a tech-chained world, a hero seeks love’s unshackled truth. Through their fight, humanity’s heart may beat free once more.

title: Dacoit
overview: A man is convicted for a crime he didn't commit owing to a betrayal by his better half. He hunts her down seeking vengeance, as their stories intertwine with a series of robberies.

title: Mohiniyattam
overview: The family's journey to Sreekandapuram to settle the late Bharathan Nair's second wife and son takes a dark turn when an issue from his past resurfaces, leading to an unexpected crime. Forced into a desperate cover-up to protect their future, the family must navigate a treacherous path of secrecy and mounting pressure, determined to overcome any obstacle by any means necessary.

title: Battle
overview: Born mute until the age of ten, a boy rises to fame as a celebrated Rap singer, but the trials of love, fame, and social conflict lead him into turmoil and push him to the edge, until he discovers the true soul and purpose of his art.

title: Sattendru Maarudhu Vaanilai
overview: When a carefree orphan and a runaway minister's daughter marry on impulse, their love is tested by financial struggles and powerful enemies — from corrupt politicians to jealous rivals. Together, they uncover hidden truths and prove that love can survive even the darkest threats.

title: Manithan Deivamagalam
overview: Manithan Deivamagalam Rural Emotional Family drama ( Inspired from  True Incidents )directed by Dennis Manjunath. The film explores themes of faith, sacrifice, and land ownership. The story is set in a nature-filled, peaceful village that faces turmoil. Selvaraghavan plays a multifaceted role. The film explores the spiritual connection between people and their land, exploring how a common man transforms into a guardian figure.

title: TAXILA
overview: When Earth is obliterated, its shattered fragments and encoded legacy are cast across the stars. Light-years away, a barren world, Taxila, awakens as Earth’s remnants seed it with life, turning humanity’s end into the universe’s next beginning.

title: Bibi Payra
overview: When two overlooked women hit their breaking point, they take bold, reckless steps to change their lives. With limited power and unexpected allies, they dive into a chaotic plan that quickly turns into a comedy of errors.

title: Bindusagar
overview: When a young woman's quest to discover her roots intersects with a grieving father's journey to faith, they find redemption and purpose in the ancient city of Bhubaneswar, India.

title: Bullet Virumandi
overview: In a village, people treat Virumandi like a god. With the help of his Bullet bike, he contests in an election. Unable to tolerate his popularity, the opposition leader Kanniyappan murders him. After his death, Virumandi appears in his assistant’s dreams and guides him to destroy the enemies and take revenge.

title: Toaster
overview: Murder and chaos erupt when a miser becomes obsessed with a toaster he gave as a wedding gift.

title: Roommates
overview: When college freshman Devon asks cool, confident Celeste to be her roommate, a blossoming friendship quickly spirals into a war of passive aggression.

title: The Great Punjab Robbery
overview: Starrig Raj Kundra and Payal Rajput

title: Je Mile Oh Kudi
overview: Rakesh Dhawan

title: Thimmarajupalli TV
overview: Hope you will rewind all your memories back, from Wi-Fi to Antenna days

title: Khushkhabri
overview: Starring Binnu Dhilon

title: Patriot
overview: A spy thriller following covert operatives as they uncover a surveillance conspiracy that escalates into a national security emergency, racing against time to dismantle the network before it silences opposition.

title: Michael
overview: Discover the story of Michael Jackson, one of the most influential artists the world has ever known, and his life beyond the music, tracing his journey from the discovery of his extraordinary talent as the lead of the Jackson Five, to the visionary artist whose creative ambition fueled a relentless pursuit to become the biggest entertainer in the world, highlighting both his life off-stage and some of the most iconic performances from his early solo career.

title: Hope
overview: On the last day of college, three lives quietly collide with memories, choices, and unspoken feelings. Hope is a poetic reflection on timing, love, and the moments that could have changed everything.  Hope follows three hearts bound by silence, longing, and what remains unsaid. A gentle story about love, timing, and the fragile beauty of unanswered emotions.

title: 70 Siyal
overview: “From the Folklore of Punjab”

title: Singh vs Kaur 2
overview: Singh vs Kaur 2 is an upcoming Indian Punjabi-language romantic comedy film directed by Navaniat Singh and produced by Gippy Grewal's Humble Motion Pictures and SVF Entertainment. Serving as a standalone sequel to the 2013 film Singh vs Kaur, it stars Gippy Grewal and Shehnaaz Gill, scheduled for worldwide release on 24th April 2026.

title: Paavakoothu
overview: Rajesh is in love with a girl named Amudhamozhi in college. She tells him to read a book called Paavakoothu and then tells him what she wants. The book describes stories from different angles, such as Theru koothu, stage play, and cinema. After reading it, he goes to talk to her.

title: Peddi
overview: In 1980s rural Andhra Pradesh, A spirited villager unites his community through sports to defend their pride against a powerful rival.

title: Kara
overview: A man shaped by violence and survival finds himself pulled back into danger he cannot escape. As hostile forces close in, past decisions begin demanding repayment. Every confrontation raises the cost of staying alive. Survival depends on resolve, instinct, and the willingness to face consequences head-on
